title: CV7 7LB, Chris Barbar Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/TP3939UF/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Chris Barbar Limited Installation name: Berryfields Farm Pig Unit Permit number: EPR/TP3939UF/S005  "
